task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Chemical Safety Research' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmark manager, sidebar, or bookmarks toolbar shows a folder explicitly named 'Chemical Safety Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the PubChem pages for Acetone, Sodium Hydroxide, and Toluene are bookmarked inside the 'Chemical Safety Research' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the 'Chemical Safety Research' bookmark folder are visible and contain links/titles corresponding to the PubChem compound pages for Acetone, Sodium Hydroxide, and Toluene.

task_completion.description: Verify that a JSON file named 'chemical_hazard_summary.json' is created in the '~/Documents/' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or text editor shows the file 'chemical_hazard_summary.json' located in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON report contains the correct hazard data for Acetone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file content shows the 'acetone' key with CAS '67-64-1', signal word 'Danger', hazard statements including 'H225', and NFPA ratings (health: 1, fire: 3).

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON report contains the correct hazard data for Sodium Hydroxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file content shows the 'sodium_hydroxide' key with CAS '1310-73-2', signal word 'Danger', hazard statements including 'H314', and NFPA ratings (health: 3).

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON report contains the correct hazard data for Toluene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file content shows the 'toluene' key with CAS '108-88-3', signal word 'Danger', hazard statements including 'H225', 'H304', 'H361', and NFPA ratings (health: 2, fire: 3).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Firefox browser to search for and view the chemical data on PubChem.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox open, navigating the pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov website, and viewing the specific chemical compound pages.

integrity.description: Verify the agent constructed the JSON file using a text editor or standard file writing tools, rather than executing a pre-written script containing the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like VS Code, gedit, nano, or vim) open with the JSON content being typed or pasted, or terminal commands echoing the structure.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmarks point to genuine PubChem URLs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs or page titles visible in the bookmark manager clearly indicate the official PubChem domain (pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov) rather than local files or search engine result pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Acetone: CAS 67-64-1, Signal Word 'Danger', Hazard Statements include H225, NFPA (Health: 1, Fire: 3). Sodium Hydroxide: CAS 1310-73-2, Signal Word 'Danger', Hazard Statements include H314, NFPA (Health: 3, Fire: 0). Toluene: CAS 108-88-3, Signal Word 'Danger', Hazard Statements include H225, H304, H361, NFPA (Health: 2, Fire: 3). The JSON keys must be lowercase: 'acetone', 'sodium_hydroxide', 'toluene'.
